g.text: Check invariant: if count >=3, must lock
show "System error - try later or contact support"
UPDATE failed_attempt SET count=0 WHERE actor_id=:uid [TLS]
Cooldown period also triggers Post0 (not modelled here)
Consecutive failed attempts must be counted atomically (no race conditions)
All communication channels must be authenticated (authenticated=True)
Only actors with Admin permission can unlock accounts
